3269940.name: AI-VJ - Real 1 Visuals
3269940.description:
New Real Series: Now with never seen before realistic movements!


This DLC adds over 350 almost real styled artistic AI visuals to AI-VJ! Real, but there's plenty of surreal & creativity going on too!

They're on a wide range of themes: From parties, DJs, bars, weddings and birthdays to animals, Greek gods, cathedrals, and vehicles!

Visuals are pre-generated for optimum performance, carefully selected and manually tweaked for artistic quality, by an experienced DJ

The visuals are recorded at 60fps, which is double the normal video framerate, to ensure smooth visuals at every BPM. The total unique runtime of all visuals together is over 45 minutes. With some duplicate plays that's standard practice in VJ sets, this package is more than enough for a two hour long DJ set

After installing the DLC you can add these visuals to your deck through the "Visuals DLCs" top menu

(We're happy to let you know that these visuals were created using green energy)
3269940.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
